name: Jimmy's Jewelry & Pawn III
description_short: Jimmy's Jewelry & Pawn III buys and loans against items of value including precious metals, electronics, vehicles, and tools in Jacksonville, FL.
description_long: Jimmy's Jewelry & Pawn III operates as a traditional pawn shop serving the Jacksonville, Florida area via phone at 904-292-1001. The business model centers on three core transactions: pawning items for short-term loans, selling merchandise, and purchasing items of value outright. The company accepts a broad range of collateral and inventory, positioning itself as a general-purpose pawn operation rather than one specializing in a single category like jewelry or electronics alone. Their service area appears to be primarily local, with customers contacting them directly by phone to discuss transactions. The business has established a web presence with an age-gated website, indicating compliance with age restrictions typical in the pawn industry. Gift certificates are now available, suggesting an effort to expand beyond traditional transaction types. The website provides minimal operational detail beyond basic service descriptions and contact information. No specific loan terms, rates, hours, address details, or customer reviews are published on the site. The company operates under standard pawn shop regulations, requiring age verification (21+) to access full website content. Without detailed terms or published rates, consumers would need to contact them directly for pricing and loan structure information.
address: 11018 Old St Augustine Rd Suite 117, Jacksonville, FL 32257

company_info.headquarters: 11018 Old St Augustine Rd Suite 117, Jacksonville, FL 32257

pros: Accepts a wide variety of collateral types—precious metals, electronics, vehicles, tools, computers, and other valuables
Offers three distinct transaction types: pawning (loans), selling, and direct purchase of items
Local, established business with direct phone line for immediate customer service
Now offers gift certificates, expanding service options beyond traditional pawn transactions
Age-gated website indicates compliance with regulatory requirements for pawn operations
No credit check or financial history required to pawn items
cons: Minimal online information—no published loan rates, terms, or APR disclosed on website
No store hours, physical address, or location map provided on the website
No customer reviews or ratings visible to evaluate service quality or fairness
Age restriction (21+) limits access to full website content without explanation of services
Lack of transparency on loan-to-value ratios or redemption policies
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash against collateral without credit checks
Individuals looking to sell used electronics, tools, vehicles, or precious metals locally
People seeking short-term loans who prefer collateral-based borrowing over traditional lending
diagnosis: Jimmy's Jewelry & Pawn III is best suited for consumers in Jacksonville needing quick cash secured by collateral, or those looking to sell valuables locally. The main caveat is the severe lack of online transparency—loan rates, terms, fees, and policies are entirely unavailable on the website, requiring direct phone contact for any financial details.
services: Pawn loans against jewelry and precious metals
Sale of pawned merchandise and inventory
